message:
test(sharded_state): add audit regression tests for root region encoding and guard drop

Deep correctness audit of runtime/sharded_state.rs (1,331 lines):
SOUND - no correctness bugs found.

Verified: all 9 ShardGuard variants follow B→A→C lock order,
Drop impl releases in correct reverse order (C→A→B), atomic
orderings are appropriate, root region encoding handles edge cases.

Add 4 regression tests: (0,0) roundtrip, large-value roundtrip,
max-value panic, guard drop release verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
